creator: anthropic.com

evidence.text: For customer support, Lindy agents resolve routine queries instantly, enabling human agents to tackle complex issues that require greater empathy and creative problem-solving. A bootstrapped productivity tool uses Lindy to provide 24/7 first-line support. Their AI agent resolves over 70% of routine tickets, while their support team can now focus on product feedback, customer success initiatives, and handling sensitive situations that necessitate human involvement.
